title: Welcome to the Future
content: Experience the next generation of presentation design. Clean, fluid, and beautifully animated.

title: Minimalist Design
content: Less is more. Our approach focuses on clarity and purpose, removing everything unnecessary.

title: Smooth Animations
content: Every transition is crafted with precision. Spring physics create natural, organic movement.

title: Dark Mode Excellence
content: True OLED black for perfect contrast. Designed for focus and reduced eye strain.

title: Responsive & Adaptive
content: Looks perfect on every device. From mobile to desktop, the experience scales beautifully.

title: Keyboard Navigation
content: Navigate with arrow keys. Press F for fullscreen. Pure efficiency at your fingertips.

title: Glassmorphism UI
content: Modern frosted glass effects create depth and hierarchy without visual clutter.

title: Start Creating
content: Your ideas deserve beautiful presentation. Begin your journey with us today.
